title: Endor PTHA Logic Tree
description: A weighted epistemic-uncertainty logic tree for probabilistic tsunami hazard analysis. Each node is a branch point over one parameter; each branch carries a weight and an optional child node. A root-to-leaf path is one model realization whose weight is the product of its branch weights.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this logic-tree format.

metadata.description: Free-form descriptive information about the tree.

node.description: A branch point: a single epistemic choice over `parameter`, expanded into mutually exclusive, collectively exhaustive branches.

id.description: Optional stable identifier. Auto-generated by tools when absent.

parameter.description: The quantity this node makes an epistemic choice about, e.g. 'scaling_relation'.

label.description: Human-readable display name for the branch point.

branches.description: Mutually exclusive alternatives. Weights should sum to 1.

branch.description: One alternative of a branch point. A branch with no child `node` is a leaf.

id.description: Optional stable identifier. Auto-generated by tools when absent.

weight.description: Epistemic weight (probability) of this alternative among its siblings.

value.description: The parameter value this branch selects. Any JSON type, including objects for structured parameters.

node.description: Optional child branch point. Absent means this branch is a leaf.
